message:
style: clippy and rustfmt cleanup across all connectors and lib.rs

Apply formatting corrections and clippy fixes throughout the connector
modules and main library. No behavioral changes.

Connector formatting (amp, copilot, copilot_cli, kimi, openclaw,
opencode, qwen):
- Collapse single-expression closures onto fewer lines where rustfmt
  prefers inline form (e.g. .or_else(|| path.file_stem()...))
- Reformat multi-line condition chains and match arms for consistency
- Consolidate use-import lines in openclaw.rs
- Reformat SQL prepare/execute calls and test assertions in opencode.rs
  to use array literals on separate lines instead of inline
- Remove unnecessary intermediate variables in copilot.rs session ID
  collection

lib.rs:
- Reformat multi-line use-import statement for connectors re-exports
- Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] on default_probe_roots()
- Add #[must_use] and #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] on
  default_probe_paths_tilde()
- Expand inline array in amp tilde path for readability
- Remove unnecessary .clone() on moved variables in tests (amp_root,
  chatgpt_root, clawdbot_sessions, openclaw_agents, vibe_sessions)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
